2603.27922.title: GEAKG: Generative Executable Algorithm Knowledge Graphs
2603.27922.paper_summary: In the context of algorithms for problem solving, procedural knowledge -- the know-how of algorithm design and operator composition -- remains implicit in code, lost between runs, and must be re-engineered for each new domain. Knowledge graphs (KGs) have proven effective for organizing declarative knowledge, yet current KG paradigms provide limited support for representing procedural knowledge as executable, learnable graph structures. We introduce \textit{Generative Executable Algorithm Knowledge Graphs} (GEAKG), a class of KGs whose nodes store executable operators, whose edges encode learned composition patterns, and whose traversal generates solutions. A GEAKG is \emph{generative} (topology and operators are synthesized by a Large Language Model), \emph{executable} (every node is runnable code), and \emph{transferable} (learned patterns generalize zero-shot across domains). The framework is domain-agnostic at the engine level: the same three-layer architecture and Ant Colony Optimization (ACO)-based learning engine can be instantiated across domains, parameterized by a pluggable ontology (\texttt{RoleSchema}). Two case studies -- sharing no domain-specific framework code -- provide concrete evidence for this framework hypothesis: (1)~Neural Architecture Search across 70 cross-dataset transfer pairs on two tabular benchmarks, and (2)~Combinatorial Optimization, where knowledge learned on the Traveling Salesman Problem transfers zero-shot to scheduling and assignment domains. Taken together, the results support that algorithmic expertise can be explicitly represented, learned, and transferred as executable knowledge graphs.
2603.27922.paper_summary_zh: 在問題解決的算法背景下，程序性知識——算法設計和操作符組合的技能——在代碼中仍然是隱含的，在運行之間丟失，並且必須為每個新領域重新工程化。知識圖譜（KGs）已被證明對組織宣告性知識有效，但當前的KG範式對於將程序性知識表示為可執行的、可學習的圖結構的支持有限。我們介紹了\textit{生成可執行算法知識圖譜}（GEAKG），這是一類KG，其節點存儲可執行操作符，邊緣編碼學習到的組合模式，並且其遍歷生成解決方案。GEAKG是\emph{生成的}（拓撲和操作符由大型語言模型合成）、\emph{可執行的}（每個節點都是可運行的代碼），以及\emph{可轉移的}（學習到的模式在領域間零-shot泛化）。該框架在引擎層面上是領域無關的：相同的三層架構和基於蟻群優化（ACO）的學習引擎可以在不同領域中實例化，並由可插拔本體（\texttt{RoleSchema}）參數化。兩個案例研究——不共享任何特定於領域的框架代碼——為該框架假設提供了具體證據：（1）在兩個表格基準上跨70個跨數據集轉移對進行神經架構搜索，以及（2）組合優化，其中在旅行商問題上學到的知識零-shot轉移到調度和分配領域。綜合來看，這些結果支持算法專業知識可以明確表示、學習和轉移為可執行的知識圖譜。
2603.27922.author: Camilo Chacón Sartori et.al.
2603.27922.authors: Camilo Chacón Sartori, José H. García, Andrei Voicu Tomut, Christian Blum
